lessonSettings.enableCustomPromptDesc: Use a custom system prompt for this lesson

canvas.analyzing: Analyzing stroke geometries and guidelines alignment...

canvas.workspaceLayoutDesc: Stack canvas and text editor vertically or horizontally

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.rememberWindowStateDesc: Save and restore the window size, position, monitor, and zoom level when closing/reopening the app.

workspaceGeneralText.title: General
workspaceGeneralText.desc: Configure general text settings for tasks.
workspaceGeneralText.fontSizeDesc: Sets the font size for the task description and solution in the practice area (also applies to text and markdown file previews).
workspaceGeneralText.showCritiqueByDefaultDesc: Automatically opens the AI critique panel when loading a task that contains a critique.

workspaceTextEditor.title: Text Editor
workspaceTextEditor.desc: Configure the text editor for your practice.
workspaceTextEditor.fontSizeDesc: Sets the font size for typing in the text editor.
workspaceTextEditor.showAllRawDesc: Default to showing raw markdown for task descriptions in the editor.

canvas.title: Canvas
canvas.autoCompleteOnSuccessDesc: Automatically mark task as completed when score is 100%
canvas.textFontSizeDesc: Font size for task instructions, solution, and AI critique on the canvas screen

eraser.title: Eraser Mode
eraser.desc: Choose how the eraser behaves when you touch the canvas.
eraser.normalDesc: Erase only where you draw, just like the pen.
eraser.strokeDesc: Delete the entire stroke you touch (like OneNote).

canvas.resetLayoutDesc: Reset the panels position and workspace split layouts back to default.
canvas.layoutResetSuccess: Canvas layout preferences have been reset successfully.

taskNumbering.title: Task Numbering
taskNumbering.desc: Configure automatic numbering of tasks based on a template.
taskNumbering.autoNumberDesc: When active, new tasks are automatically named using the template.
taskNumbering.templateDesc: Use {n} as a placeholder for the ascending number.
taskNumbering.hideCompletedSectionsDesc: Hides sections when all tasks within them are completed and hidden.
taskNumbering.defaultEditModeDesc: Choose which editors are selected by default when creating a new task.

api.title: API
api.filterPdf: Show Only File Models (e.g., PDF files)
api.customModelPressEnter: Custom model - Press Enter to save
api.evaluationDetailsDesc: Configure what data is sent to the AI for evaluation
api.maxOutputTokensTooltip: Sets the maximum number of response tokens. Useful to prevent expensive errors for models with high costs or when credits are low. Note: If the model's response is cut off due to a low limit, it will be incomplete, unusable, and cannot be processed.
api.showCanvasAnnotationsTooltip: Shows visual markers for errors/corrections directly on the canvas. Since some models return inaccurate coordinates, this can be disabled to receive only text feedback.
api.reasoningDesc: Enable reasoning tokens for better analysis (may increase cost)
api.reasoningLevelDesc: Select the level of reasoning/thinking for this model
api.autoProviderInfo: When enabled, OpenRouter will automatically select the best provider for your request.

data.title: Data Management
data.cleanMediaDesc: Cleans up all orphaned media files from the database and disk that are no longer referenced by any profile, lesson, task, or background.

notifications.cleanMediaSuccess: Media cleanup completed. Deleted {count} orphaned media file(s).
notifications.cleanMediaNoOrphans: All media is clean. No orphaned files found.
notifications.syncNoChanges: WebDAV sync completed. No changes detected.
notifications.syncDbDownloaded: Database downloaded from WebDAV. Local data updated.

update.title: Update Settings
update.desc: Configure automatic updates and search manually for new versions.
update.autoCheckEnabledDesc: Automatically check for new versions on GitHub when the app starts.
update.noUpdates: You already have the latest version.
update.error: Failed to download or run the update.
update.popupMsg: A new version ({version}) is available. Do you want to install it now?
update.noInstallerFound: No installation file (.exe) found in this release.

stylus.title: Stylus
stylus.howToStep2: Press and hold a stylus button while touching the screen
stylus.howToStep3: Release the button when you see the detected combination
stylus.howToStep4: Assign an action to the button
stylus.modalStep2: Press and hold a stylus button
stylus.modalWarning: Do not use the tip of the stylus

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.confirmEditMsg: This will allow you to modify the system prompt. Be careful as incorrect prompts may affect AI performance.
systemPrompt.warningDesc: Incorrect prompts may cause the AI to behave unexpectedly.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.desc: Track your AI usage and costs
stats.confirmResetMsg: Are you sure you want to reset all usage statistics?

language.title: Language Selection
language.selectDesc: Choose the language for the user interface

dialogs.importNoCanvasDesc: No canvas saves available in the import
dialogs.importErrorTasksOnlyInLesson: Tasks can only be imported into a lesson.
dialogs.importErrorLessonsOnlyOnHome: Lessons can only be imported on the home screen.
dialogs.importMultipleAsNew: {count} lessons will be imported as new lessons
